contents.text:
Hi {{2.lead_name}},

I hope you're doing well.

I wanted to quickly follow up regarding your request for {{2.lead_service}}.

Based on what you shared, there seems to be a strong opportunity to help you streamline and improve your processes.

Would you be available for a short call to discuss your requirements in more detail?

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,  
Sales Team
